Our **mobile car detailing** service eliminates all that hassle. **Benefits of Mobile Auto Detailing:** - No travel required - we come to you - Save 2-3 hours of your day - Watch the transformation happen - Perfect for busy professionals - Ideal for fleet vehicles - Same quality as shop-based detailing ### Our Mobile Car Detail Columbia SC Services Our **mobile detailing Columbia SC** team provides comprehensive **auto detailing services** including: **Exterior Mobile Detailing:** - Hand wash and dry - Clay bar treatment - Paint correction - Wax or sealant application - Wheel and tire detailing - Chrome polishing - Trim restoration **Interior Car Detailing Near Me:** - Complete vacuum - Steam cleaning - Leather conditioning - Fabric protection - Odor elimination - Dashboard and console detailing - Door jamb cleaning **Advanced Mobile Services:** - Ceramic coating application - Paint correction - Headlight restoration - Engine bay detailing ### Mobile Detailing Columbia SC Coverage Areas Our **mobile car detailing Columbia SC** service covers: - Downtown Columbia - Forest Acres - Shandon - Rosewood - Lexington - Irmo - Cayce - West Columbia We bring professional **auto detailing mobile** services within a 25-mile radius of Columbia. Learn more about our [Columbia SC auto detailing service area](/locations/columbia-sc) and everything we offer local customers. ### What Makes Our Mobile Auto Detailing Different? **Professional Equipment:** Our **mobile vehicle detailing** van is fully equipped with commercial-grade equipment, including: - Onboard water system (200+ gallons) - Generator for power tools - Professional extractors - Dual-action polishers - Steam cleaners **Eco-Friendly:** Our **mobile automotive detailing** process uses biodegradable products and minimizes water waste. **IDA Certified:** Unlike many **auto detailers near me mobile**, we maintain International Detailing Association certification. ### Mobile Car Detailing Pricing Columbia SC **Basic Mobile Detail:** $150-200 - Exterior wash and wax - Interior vacuum - Window cleaning **Premium Mobile Detail:** $250-350 - Everything in Basic - Paint correction - Interior deep clean - Leather conditioning **Ultimate Mobile Detail:** $400-500 - Everything in Premium - Ceramic coating prep - Engine bay detail - Headlight restoration ### How Mobile Detailing Works 1. **Book Online or Call:** Schedule your **mobile car detail Columbia SC** appointment 2. **We Come to You:** Our team arrives at your location with all equipment 3. **Professional Service:** 2-5 hour service depending on package 4. **Enjoy Results:** Drive away with a showroom-quality vehicle ### Mobile Detailing vs Traditional Shops Why **mobile detailing near me** beats traditional **car detail shops near me**: | Feature | Mobile Detailing | Traditional Shop | |---------|-----------------|------------------| | Convenience | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐ | | Time Saved | 3+ hours | 0 hours | | Quality | Professional | Professional | | Equipment | Commercial-grade | Commercial-grade | | Price | Comparable | Comparable | | Personalized Service | Yes | Limited | ### Mobile Auto Detailing Columbia SC: Customer Reviews *"Best mobile car detailing I've found. Frequently Asked Questions

How much does mobile car detailing cost in Columbia SC?

Mobile car detailing in Columbia SC typically ranges from $150-$400 depending on your vehicle size and service package. Basic exterior washes start at $150, while full interior/exterior details with ceramic coating can reach $400+. We serve all of Columbia, including downtown, Forest Acres, and Shandon neighborhoods.

Do you offer mobile detailing services in Lexington and Irmo?

Yes! Our mobile detailing service covers Columbia SC and surrounding areas including Lexington, Irmo, West Columbia, Cayce, and Forest Acres. We bring professional-grade equipment directly to your home or office within a 25-mile radius of Columbia.

How long does a mobile car detail take?

A complete mobile car detail typically takes 2-4 hours depending on your vehicle's condition and size. Express exterior washes take 45-60 minutes, while full interior/exterior details with paint correction require 3-4 hours. We work efficiently while maintaining IDA-certified quality standards.

What areas in Columbia SC do you serve for mobile detailing?

We provide mobile car detailing throughout Columbia SC including: Downtown Columbia, Forest Acres, Shandon, Rosewood, Eau Claire, Lexington, Irmo, West Columbia, Cayce, and surrounding Richland County areas. Contact us to confirm service availability at your location.

Is mobile car detailing as good as shop detailing?

Absolutely! Our mobile detailing service uses the same professional-grade equipment, IDA-certified techniques, and premium products as traditional detail shops. We bring everything needed including water, power, and specialized tools to deliver showroom results at your location.

Do I need to provide water or electricity for mobile detailing?

No! Our mobile detailing unit is completely self-contained with onboard water tanks and generators. We bring everything needed to detail your vehicle professionally without requiring any utilities from your home or office in Columbia SC.

Can you detail my car at my workplace in Columbia?

Yes! Workplace detailing is one of our most popular services in Columbia SC. We can detail your vehicle while you work at offices throughout downtown Columbia, Fort Jackson, USC campus areas, and business parks in Lexington and Irmo.
